Ibn Haldun University Family Met at the Discussion and Evaluation Camp

21.09.2022

The second of our 2022 Discussion and Evaluation Camps was held.

The second of our 2022 Discussion and Evaluation Camps was held in Yalova-Rizom Holiday Village on 16-18 September.

At the opening of the camp where our academic and administrative staff attended with their families, Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. İrfan Gündüz, Vice Chairman of the Board of Trustees Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan and Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan made speeches.

In addition to various training seminars, social activities were also organized in the camp.
